content.rendered:
UMTC is a consulting firm that provides urban transportation solutions to facilitate the design, development and implementation of sustainable urban mobility. It is involved in assisting local bodies and State Governments by providing services towards public transport planning, short term improvement measures, urban and transport planning, NMT improvement measures, integrated land use transport planning, to name a few.

At UMTC, we believe Excellence is the natural outgrowth of creativity, imagination, and innovation. Through our dedication to this quality, we raise industry standards, are the employer of choice, and constantly strive to be the best. Excellence at UMTC is fostered by a spirit of enquiry and constructive debate, resulting in quick response and superior execution.

We are proud of our talent pool that specializes in Transport Planning/Transportation Engineering/Urban Planning. Our continuous investment in knowledge creation and sharpening skill sets helps us to leverage, invest, grow and generate far better returns from our human capital. Knowledge, in fact, is the key differentiator in our organization.

Our new employees bring with them the expertise to consolidate and sustain UMTC’s business growth. At UMTC, our employees have an opportunity to be part of something monumental – contributing to the building of world-class infrastructure in India.

To minimize talent attrition, we look at movement of talent from one place to another through an internal job posting program. Through this, employees can apply to any new vacancy within the organization. The program has ensured that we have one of the lowest rates of employee attrition in any industry.
